characters.name: Riven
characters.description: Every round she deals damage she loses 3HP. Win 2 consecutive rounds to pause self-damage and reset the streak.

characters.name: Liora
characters.description: Every round accuracy above 95% heals 3HP. Capped at 15HP total per match.

characters.name: Zephon
characters.description: When Mana reaches 9 or higher, gain +5 bonus damage to your attack.
